Spot is trapped between the massive 710 Resonance level and 700 structural support, increasing the likelihood of volatile, choppy price action and aggressive dealer hedging flows.

outlook.summary: Spot is hovering just above the massive 26700 Resonance level, which acts as strong structural support. Positive GEX across all timeframes suggests market makers will actively pin the price and suppress volatility. Despite a bearish short-term skew, the structural boundaries are firmly established between 26700 and 26900.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across all expirations (3792 Monthly, 165 Weekly, extreme 0DTE volume). Positioned just below spot, it acts as a powerful support floor due to dealer long gamma hedging.

Major Put OI in 0DTE (468) and Monthly (86) defines a firm extreme downside support boundary in case of a breakdown.
0DTE Max Pain level acting as a gravitational anchor for today's session, pulling price down in a stable GEX environment.
Monthly Call Wall (OI 378) establishes a hard upper boundary for the current trend, limiting bullish extrapolations.
